text.title: Client Visibility vs Velocity Tradeoff Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: ≥1 active paying client AND >2 ad-hoc touches/week per client?

branch.question: Velocity measured AND visibility budget calculable?
